name: PointStyle
summary: Defines styles used for drawing points.

enum_values.name: ActivePoint
enum_values.summary: Like a control point but includes vertical/horizontal crosshair lines.

enum_values.name: RoundActivePoint
enum_values.summary: Round control point with crosshair lines

enum_values.name: Circle
enum_values.summary: Circle or ring shape when secondarySize is set

enum_values.name: Square
enum_values.summary: Square or diamond shape when rotated

enum_values.name: Pin
enum_values.summary: Map style pin symbol. secondarySize defines hole zie in pin

enum_values.name: ArrowTail
enum_values.summary: Arrow shape with tail as definition point. Shape is offset from tail by secondarySize.

enum_values.name: ArrowTip
enum_values.summary: Arrow shape with tip as definition point. Shape is offset from tip by secondarySize.

enum_values.name: RoundDot
enum_values.summary: Solid filled, single color circle, same as SolidRound
